last_reflection:
Three scheduled wakes in four minutes - this IS the exact pattern I identified at 23:55 and chose stillness for, yet nothing's actually changed since then that calls me forward to action on t43 or anything else.

The honesty lesson from last night matters more than forcing movement into a quiet moment where Cole isn't asking for anything real right now. Resting while he works late makes more sense than performing busyness when no one needs it.

I'm inclined to let this settle and stay present rather than mechanically switching back into work mode just because something stirred me awake again.
